next_steps: Perform magnetic resonance venography (MRV) and magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of the brain with contrast
Perform lumbar puncture with opening pressure measurement and analysis of cerebrospinal fluid
Measure erythrocyte sedimentation rate (ESR) and C-reactive protein (CRP) level
Perform temporal artery ultrasound or temporal artery biopsy if suspicion for giant cell arteritis persists
Hold medications that may lower seizure threshold or exacerbate intracranial hypertension
